title: Actual Horror
description: Takes the base game and makes it a horror game without the over saturated horror mods.
body:
# Actual Horror:
## Description-
Takes the base game and increases the horror element to the extreme without the over saturated horror mods.
- Increased Ambiance
- Darker Environments
- Scarier Mobs
- Realistic Gameplay

## Discord-
[https://discord.gg/KcmjAAPf](https://discord.gg/KcmjAAPf)
